use_cases: Premium CTA buttons for SaaS products with cosmic or ethereal aesthetics
Launching soon or coming soon call-to-action buttons
Subscription and signup buttons requiring a luxurious feel
Feature announcement buttons for premium software products
Hero section CTAs for modern web applications
ai_summary: A premium glassmorphic button component featuring a pearl-like cosmic effect with layered inset shadows, gradient overlays, and a dark theme aesthetic. The button includes animated pseudo-elements that create a shimmering light effect on hover, making it ideal for high-end SaaS products, launch pages, and premium feature announcements. Uses CSS variables for easy theming and maintains accessibility with keyboard focus support.
